qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Architecture or post graduate degree in Architecture from a recognised university with Minimum 10 years' of experience of designing Health Care Project / Hospitals in public sector
qualification.details: Retired Government / Autonomous body officers, who have held the responsibility at the level of Dy. Secretary/Director of the Government of India or equivalent position in Autonomous Bodies. Possessing Bachelor Degree in Architecture or post graduate degree in Architecture from a recognised university. Minimum 10 years' of experience of designing Health Care Project / Hospitals in public sector.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIAFMR Project Consultant / Senior Project Consultant (Architectural) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NEIAFMR Project Consultant / Senior Project Consultant (Architectural) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced for this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the post of Project Consultant / Senior Project Consultant (Architectural) in the North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Folk Medicine Research.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's or Post Graduate Degree in Architecture from a recognized university with a minimum of 10 years of experience in designing healthcare projects or hospitals in the public sector.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this position is 64 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their complete application via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Consultant / Senior Project Consultant (Architectural) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Personal Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Consultant / Senior Project Consultant (Architectural) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Folk Medicine Research (NEIAFMR).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
